courseCreate.commissionDesc: When your course sells: you keep 100% on odd sales (1st, 3rd, 5th...) and pass up even sales (2nd, 4th, 6th, 8th) to your sponsor. Your sponsor must own the same tier to receive the pass-up.

upgrade.earnWhileGrowDesc: Refer a member and earn 50% commission — every month they stay active, or one big payout on annual billing.

visualiser.title: Visualiser
visualiser.subtitle: Watch your income streams come to life
visualiser.pressPlayToWatch: Press Play to watch your team build...
visualiser.simulationDisclaimer: Simulation for educational purposes only. Actual earnings depend on personal activity and network performance. Income is not guaranteed.
visualiser.yourGridFills: Your grid fills from your entire network
visualiser.gridFillsDesc: Every person who joins anywhere in your downline fills a seat in your grid. Your direct referrals AND their referrals AND deeper — all the way down. One person, one seat, per advance.

features.linkToolsDesc: Short links, QR codes, UTM tracking

campaignTiers.title: Campaign Tiers
campaignTiers.subtitle: Activate tiers to advertise your videos and earn grid commissions
campaignTiers.heroDesc: Each tier delivers real video views through Watch & Earn. You earn commissions as your grid fills with 64 members.
campaignTiers.howItWorksDesc: Each tier gives your videos real views through the Watch & Earn network. When you activate a tier, you are placed into an 8×8 grid with 64 member positions.
campaignTiers.renewalDesc: Tiers expire once all allocated views have been delivered. To continue receiving views and earning grid commissions, simply re-activate the tier. All one-time USDT payments — no subscriptions or recurring charges.
campaignTiers.earningsDisclaimer: Earnings based on 5 personal referrals. Income may vary depending on the number of personals referred into your grid.
